name: markdrop
summary: A comprehensive PDF processing toolkit that converts PDFs to markdown with advanced AI-powered features for image and table analysis. Supports local files and URLs, preserves document structure, extracts high-quality images, detects tables using advanced ML models, and generates detailed content descriptions using multiple LLM providers including OpenAI GPT-4o, Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude, Groq, OpenRouter, and LiteLLM.
author: Shorya Sethia
